title: Napkins Paper Compostable Frozen 2 33x33cm - 20 pieces
features: You can use this article for the following party occasion(s): Children's party.
The article is made from industrial compostable paper. Compostable products can be returned to the environment after their use where they decompose fast and do not leave toxic residues.
description: From the manufacturer ECO Tableware As the technology evolves, at Folat we follow the developments, innovations and trends regarding party service. For this reason, we are introducing an ECO line. This line covers a wide variety of disposable compostable paper products, reusable products and products made from renewable sources. Compostable products can be returned to the environment after use, where they decompose quickly and leave no toxic residue. “OK compost Home” is a certification that can be applied to products that can be composted at lower temperatures, so they can go into the compost heap in your garden at home. The requirements for a product to be certified as “OK Compost Home” are : At least 90% Disintegration in 26 weeks at ambient temperatures (between 20°C and 30°C) At least 90 % Biodegradation in 12 months at ambient temperatures (between 20°C and 30°C) Absence of negative impact on the plants after composting Low level of heavy metals and fluorine (according to EN 13432) “OK compost Home” is a certification that can be applied to products that can be composted at lower temperatures, so they can go into the compost heap in your garden at home.
